# Security Policy

This is the default security policy for my projects.

## Reporting a Security Vulnerability

Please do not disclose unresolved security vulnerabilities publicly. If you discover a potential security issue in any of my projects, please use one of the following methods to report it:

- **Private Vulnerability Reporting**: Most of my repositories have [private vulnerability reporting](https://docs.github.com/code-security/security-advisories/guidance-on-reporting-and-writing-information-about-vulnerabilities/privately-reporting-a-security-vulnerability) enabled. This is the preferred method. You can fill out the report with the information you have, and we can clarify details later.
- **Email**: Alternatively, you can reach out directly via email at <[EMAIL_ADDRESS]>.

## Supported Versions

Unless otherwise stated, security support is provided only for the `main` branch and the latest official release.

---
